steps.title: Recognize what 'thoroughness' requires
steps.content: Thorough investigation requires both breadth (diverse approaches and sources) and depth (extensive work). The notes show both: Tarbell interviewed multiple types of sources (executives, workers, officials) AND examined thousands of pages of company documents.

steps.title: Find the choice using both pieces of evidence
steps.content:
Ida Tarbell not only interviewed Standard Oil executives, oil industry workers, and public officials but also examined thousands of pages of the company's internal communications. includes both her diverse interviews and extensive document review, using “not only...but also” to emphasize that she employed these methods comprehensively.

The other choices omit the document review, provide context rather than methods, or focus on the book's outcome rather than the investigation.

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
